offer: For hospitality accounting teams processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate invoice matching causes supplier penalties. We automate vendor invoice matching instead of manual invoice matching and reporting.
problem: Inaccurate invoice matching leading to discrepancies
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to hospitality accounting teams with demo
Participate in community forums sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and discrepancy report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
